entry.title: New: Bill 29 (Hawaiʻi County) — Passed Second Reading
entry.content:
AMENDS CHAPTER 25, ARTICLE 3, SECTION 25-3-3, OF THE HAWAIʻI COUNTY CODE 1983 (2016 EDITION, AS AMENDED), RELATING TO THE ESTABLISHMENT OF ZONING DISTRICTS

Allows for the establishment of special zoning districts using methods of geographical description other than metes and bounds.

Latest action: Council: Bill 29, Draft 2 passes second & final reading - 8/20/25

View on the council site
